subcodes.first_line: The Book of Wisdom hath been sent down by the Lord of this mighty Day. Blessed is he who hath inhaled therefrom the fragrance of God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب حکیم انزله مالک هذا الیوم العظیم طوبی لمن وجد منه عرف الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
